title: dendrobium polycladium var. atractoglossum
intro: Dendrobium polycladium var. atractoglossum, commonly known as the Atractogyne orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, although its availability and commercialization are limited due to its endangered status.
